v0.1.0.description:
Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2008  

## Compatibility
- Archipelago: `0.6.6`

## Install
1. Download `yugioh_wc2008.apworld` from this release.
2. Place it in your Archipelago `custom_worlds/` folder.
3. Restart Archipelago Launcher.

## Current Features
- WC2008 world logic integration
- duel world checks 
- DP filler item support
- 

## Notes
- This is an early public release; balance and item pool expansion will continue.
- Planned future additions include deck lists, cosmetics (duel disks/clothing), and WC duelist-related unlock ideas.
v0.1.0.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! WC2008 APWorld v0.1.0
